'''zajafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynactin|dynactin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynactin|dynactin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zajafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjæfæth|zæjæfæth]] || [[word:zæjæfæj|zæjæfæj]] || [[word:zæjæfæsh|zæjæfæsh]] || [[word:zæjæfæ|zæjæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajajafath|zajajafath]] || [[word:zajajafaj|zajajafaj]] || [[word:zajajafash|zajajafash]] || [[word:zajajafa|zajajafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajafath|zajafath]] || [[word:zajafaj|zajafaj]] || [[word:zajafash|zajafash]] || [[word:zajafa|zajafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajaffafth|zajaffafth]] || [[word:zajaffafj|zajaffafj]] || [[word:zajaffafsh|zajaffafsh]] || [[word:zajaffaf|zajaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajafatha|zajafatha]] || [[word:zajafaja|zajafaja]] || [[word:zajafasha|zajafasha]] || [[word:zajafaka|zajafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajafath|zajafath]] || [[word:zajafaj|zajafaj]] || [[word:zajafash|zajafash]] || [[word:zajafa|zajafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajafathal|zajafathal]] || [[word:zajafajal|zajafajal]] || [[word:zajafashal|zajafashal]] || [[word:zajafakal|zajafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajafaathatha|zajafaathatha]] || [[word:zajafaajaja|zajafaajaja]] || [[word:zajafaashasha|zajafaashasha]] || [[word:zajafaaka|zajafaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajafathan|zajafathan]] || [[word:zajafajan|zajafajan]] || [[word:zajafashan|zajafashan]] || [[word:zajafakan|zajafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajafathaoro|zajafathaoro]] || [[word:zajafajaoro|zajafajaoro]] || [[word:zajafashaoro|zajafashaoro]] || [[word:zajafakaoro|zajafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a890715}}
